result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded 6 wave files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, harmonized sexuality variables across all ages (sori19, sori20, sori22, sori32), converted wave-specific missing codes to standard codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -7=Prefer not to say, -1=Item not applicable, -3=Not asked), and created factor variables with explicit labels. The cleaned output has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 records and 5 variables (NSID + 4 age-specific sexuality variables).
